import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('database/automotive_complaints.db'\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\(\\"SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE name='nhtsa_recalls'\\"\)
print\('nhtsa_recalls schema:'\)
print\(cur.fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\(\)
cur.execute\(\\"SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE name='recalls_fts'\\"\)
print\('recalls_fts schema:'\)
print\(cur.fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\(\)
cur.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM nhtsa_recalls'\)
print\('nhtsa_recalls row count:', cur.fetchone\(\)[0]\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('database/automotive_complaints.db'\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT make || '|' || model\) FROM complaints_fts WHERE CAST\(year AS INTEGER\) BETWEEN 2015 AND 2025\\"\)
print\('Distinct make/model combos \(2015-2025\):', cur.fetchone\(\)[0]\)
cur.execute\(\\"SELECT DISTINCT make, model FROM complaints_fts WHERE CAST\(year AS INTEGER\) BETWEEN 2015 AND 2025 ORDER BY make, model LIMIT 20\\"\)
print\('Sample combos:'\)
for r in cur.fetchall\(\):
    print\(' ', r\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
import requests, json
r = requests.get\(
    'https://api.nhtsa.gov/recalls/recallsByVehicle',
    params={'make': 'HONDA', 'model': 'CR-V', 'modelYear': 2020},
    headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'},
    timeout=10
\)
print\('Status:', r.status_code\)
data = r.json\(\)
print\('Count:', data.get\('Count'\)\)
if data.get\('results'\):
    print\('Sample result keys:', list\(data['results'][0].keys\(\)\)\)
    print\('Sample:', json.dumps\(data['results'][0], indent=2\)\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('database/automotive_complaints.db'\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\('SELECT DISTINCT make FROM nhtsa_recalls ORDER BY make'\)
makes = [r[0] for r in cur.fetchall\(\)]
print\(f'Total makes: {len\(makes\)}'\)
print\('All makes:', makes\)
conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 - <<'EOF'
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from scripts.import_nhtsa_recalls_api import normalize_model

test_cases = [
    \("FORD",       "F-150 REGULAR CAB",   "F-150"\),
    \("FORD",       "F-150 CREW CAB",      "F-150"\),
    \("FORD",       "ESCAPE GAS",          "ESCAPE"\),
    \("FORD",       "ESCAPE HEV",          "ESCAPE"\),
    \("FORD",       "MUSTANG MACH-E",      "MUSTANG MACH-E"\),
    \("FORD",       "MUSTANG CONVERTIBLE", "MUSTANG"\),
    \("HONDA",      "CIVIC SEDAN",         "CIVIC"\),
    \("HONDA",      "CIVIC HATCH",         "CIVIC"\),
    \("HONDA",      "ACCORD HYBRID",       "ACCORD"\),
    \("CHEVROLET",  "EQUINOX EV",          "EQUINOX"\),
]

all_pass = True
for make, model, expected in test_cases:
    got = normalize_model\(model\)
    status = "PASS" if got == expected else "FAIL"
    if status == "FAIL":
        all_pass = False
    print\(f"  {status}  {make:<12} {model:<30} -> {got!r:25}  \(expected {expected!r}\)"\)

print\(\)
print\("ALL PASS" if all_pass else "SOME FAILURES — see above"\)
EOF)
